laws.title: Texas Minimum Wage — $7.25/hr (Federal Rate)
laws.summary: Texas adopts the federal minimum wage of $7.25 per hour. There is no state-level minimum above the federal rate, and Texas law prohibits local governments from setting a higher local minimum wage. Tipped employees may be paid $2.13/hour provided tips bring total compensation to at least $7.25/hour.
compliance_actions: Pay all non-exempt employees at least $7.25/hour
For tipped employees, ensure employer-paid wage plus tips equals at least $7.25/hour
Post the Texas Minimum Wage Act notice in a conspicuous workplace location
Retain payroll records showing hours worked and wages paid for at least 4 years
